section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.intro: FM Solution collects information that you provide directly when you:

section2.title: 2. How We Use Information
section2.intro: We use the collected information to:
items: Improve your experience on the site
Send communications related to requested services

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes. We may share information only when required by law or to protect our rights.

section4.title: 4. Security
section4.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
section5.intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to:

section6.title: 6. Cookies
section6.content: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

section7.title: 7. Privacy Policy Changes
section7.content: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

section8.title: 8. Contact
section8.intro: For privacy questions or to exercise your rights, contact us:

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By using this site and FM Solution's services, you accept these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, do not use our services.

section2.title: 2. Services Offered
section2.content: FM Solution offers software consulting, custom development, AI integration, and technical training services. Specific details of each service will be defined in separate contracts.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual Property
section3.content: The code, deliverables, and intellectual property developed for the client will be transferred to the client upon project completion and full payment, unless otherwise agreed contractually.

section4.title: 4. Payments
section4.intro: Payment terms will be specified in individual contracts. Generally:

section5.title: 5. Warranties and Liability
section5.content: We guarantee that services will be provided with professional competence. However, we do not guarantee specific business results. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the specific service.

section6.title: 6. Confidentiality
section6.content: We are committed to keeping all sensitive client information confidential. Separate NDAs can be signed if necessary.

section7.title: 7. Contract Termination
section7.content: Both parties may terminate the contract with 30 days written notice, unless otherwise specified contractually. Payments for work already performed remain due.

section8.title: 8. Changes to Terms
section8.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms. Changes will be communicated to active clients and posted on this page.

section9.title: 9. Applicable Law
section9.content: These terms are governed by Italian law. For disputes, the competent court is Milan.

section10.title: 10. Contact
section10.intro: For questions about the terms of service, contact us:

hero.heading: Software and AI experts with a clear mission
hero.subheading: Transform complex technical challenges into measurable value for companies

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Make advanced technology accessible and useful for Italian companies. Too often we see technology projects fail due to lack of pragmatism, unrealistic expectations, or overly complex solutions.
mission.paragraph2: We bring a different approach: concrete solutions, transparent communication, focus on measurable results. No buzzwords, no hype. Only what works.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.paragraph1: We believe in a future where AI and advanced technologies are pragmatic tools serving business, not ends in themselves. Where companies of any size can compete thanks to well-implemented technology.
vision.paragraph2: We want to be the technology partner of reference for companies seeking concrete results, not consultants who sell slides and disappear.

values.heading: Our values
values.subheading: The principles that guide our work every day

pragmatism.title: Pragmatism
pragmatism.description: Concrete solutions based on proven technologies. No hype, only what works for your business.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: We take responsibility for results. Your success is our success, your problem is our problem.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear communication, realistic expectations, detailed reporting. You always know where we are and where we're going.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We don't compromise on code quality, architecture, and approach. We build to last.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We work with you, not for you. The best results come from close collaboration with internal teams.

story.heading: My story

paragraph1.text: A system that was supposed to reduce processing times by 90%. The client had already spent months with other consultants, receiving only PowerPoint presentations and promises.

story.paragraph2: In three weeks, I built a microservices pipeline that exceeded every expectation. Not magic—just solid engineering, no frills.

paragraph3.end: . No giant teams, just a few people solving complex problems with code that actually works.

story.paragraph4: I graduated in Computer Engineering from RHUL, but the real school was in the field: optimizing real-time systems, designing enterprise event-driven architectures, tokenizing properties on blockchain.

paragraph5.start: FM Solution is where I put this expertise at the service of Italian companies.
paragraph5.end: No intermediaries, no overhead, just measurable results.

step4.title: Implementation
step4.description: We execute iteratively, with frequent deliverables and continuous feedback. Always aligned.

step5.title: Support
step5.description: We don't disappear after launch. Continuous support, optimization, and scaling as you grow.

faq.heading: Contact FAQ
faq.subheading: Frequently asked questions about contacting us
faq.question1: How long does it take to receive a response?
faq.answer1: We respond to all emails within 24 business hours. For urgent matters, contact us via email specifying the priority.
faq.question2: Is the first consultation really free?
faq.answer2: Yes, we always offer a free 30-minute initial consultation to understand your needs and evaluate how we can help you.
faq.question3: Do you work with clients throughout Italy?
faq.answer3: Yes, we work with clients throughout Italy (and internationally). Most collaboration happens remotely, with periodic in-person meetings if necessary.

hero.heading: Pragmatic Artificial Intelligence for your business
hero.subheading: We identify concrete opportunities, implement verifiable solutions, and measure ROI. No hype, just results.

faq.question1: How long does it take to integrate AI?
faq.answer1: It depends on complexity. A pilot project requires 4-6 weeks, while a complete implementation can take 2-3 months. We work iteratively to show tangible results from the first weeks.
faq.question2: How much does an AI integration project cost?
faq.answer2: Costs vary based on scope and complexity. An initial assessment starts at €5,000, while complete projects range from €20,000 to €100,000+. We always provide a detailed quote after the assessment.
faq.question3: Do you need access to our sensitive data?
faq.answer3: We work with the highest security and GDPR compliance standards. We can work with anonymized data, in an isolated environment, or on-premise if necessary. The privacy and security of your data is a priority.
faq.question4: What skills should our team have?
faq.answer4: No specific AI skills are needed. We handle the technical part. It's useful to have an internal person who knows the processes to automate well and can collaborate with us in the requirement phase.
faq.question5: How do you measure AI ROI?
faq.answer5: We define clear KPIs from the start: time saved, error reduction, conversion increase, etc. We monitor metrics pre and post-implementation and provide periodic reports with measurable results.
